description_long: This object is a compact, handheld projector with a sleek, angular body finished in dark gray and accented by a diagonal red and yellow stripe. The main housing is rectangular with slightly rounded edges, and a prominent cylindrical lens assembly protrudes from the front. A pistol-grip style handle extends downward, featuring a gold-colored tip, suggesting ergonomic design for easy carrying or aiming. The side of the body displays a small circular button or indicator and a black rectangular panel, possibly for controls or access. The lens is multi-segmented, with gold rings adding a technical, high-precision appearance. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, suitable for portable use in urban environments.
description: A compact, handheld projector with a dark gray body, red and yellow accent stripe, and a prominent cylindrical lens. Features a pistol-grip handle and gold detailing for a modern, portable look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the diagonal red and yellow stripe, circular button, black panel, and ergonomic handle with gold tip.
description_view_1: Front view dominated by the large, round lens assembly, with the rectangular body and handle mostly hidden.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the accent stripe and handle visible, but no button or panel on this side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the rectangular body and the handle extending downward, with no visible controls or lens.
attribute_lens_type: fixed; large cylindrical lens with gold accent rings, no visible adjustment rings
attribute_control_panel_design: Single circular button or indicator and a rectangular panel on the side; no extensive control panel visible
